productDisplayName: Scullers Men Blue & Green Check Shirt
description: CompositionGreen and blue plaid check  shirt with yellow accents made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves, full buttoned placket, curved hemline and with a pocket on left chestWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This green and blue plaid check shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The cool green and blue combo works well and gives off a fresh vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look. Size and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
